column2: Has your doctor completed diagnostic testing without finding a definite cause for your pain or illness?
column3: Has your physician diagnosed your symptoms as being caused by organ disease or structural damage, but your condition is not improving as expected?
column4: Have you had more than one symptom for longer than six months?
column5: Are your symptoms increased by stress or thinking about stressful situations?
column6: Would you describe yourself as highly detail-oriented, highly self-critical, a perfectionist or do you routinely put the needs of others ahead of your own needs?
column7: Are people who caused stress for you as a child still active in your life?
column8: Have you experienced a significant amount of stress in your life recently?
column9: In the last two weeks, have you often felt little interest or pleasure in doing things or have you felt down, depressed, or hopeless?
column10: Did your symptoms begin soon after a terrifying, traumatic, or horrifying event or after a triggering event that is linked to that trauma?
column11: In the last two weeks, have you often felt nervous, anxious or on edge or have you been unable to stop or control worrying?
column12: Please enter your email to see your results.
column13: Are your symptoms located in different areas of the body or do they move to different locations?
column14: If you learned that a child you care about was experiencing everything you did as a child, how would this make you feel?
